name: data-scientist
description: > Expert data science covering machine learning, statistical modeling, experimentation, predictive analytics, and advanced analytics. Use when selecting ML algorithms, engineering features, designing A/B tests, evaluating model performance, or building predictive pipelines.
author: borghei
summary_zh: 一个覆盖机器学习、统计建模和实验设计的数据科学工具，适合算法选型、特征工程和构建预测管线等场景。
